who: small HR teams using Gusto for payroll processing 5–15 employees/month
offer: For small HR teams using Gusto for payroll processing 5–15 employees/month, manual report generation causes compliance issues. We simplify report generation instead of manual report generation using spreadsheets.
problem: Generating accurate monthly tax withholding reports from payroll data.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for small HR teams
Indie Hackers discussions about payroll workflows

Community forums for sharing payroll tools
try_it: Let users try user-friendly interface for report customization
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing payroll data
